zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron於1372年出生在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆時，他的父親Sir John Clifton14歲，母親Elizabeth Cromwell15歲。他於1390年2月之後與Margaret Howard在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年2月19日在他的家鄉享年24歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron于1372年出生在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆时，他的父亲Sir John Clifton14岁，母亲Elizabeth Cromwell15岁。他于1390年2月之后与Margaret Howard在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年2月19日在他的家乡享年24岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Constantine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Constantinus, a derivative of Constans; see Constant . In early modern English the names Constant and Constantine were not always clearly distinguished. The Roman emperor Constantine the Great ( ?288–337 ) is specially honoured in the Christian Church as the first Christian emperor. The name was also borne by three kings of medieval Scotland, where it represents an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Conn , and is a traditional name in the Phipps (Marquesses of Normanby) family.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron was born in 1372, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Clifton, was 14 and his mother, Elizabeth Cromwell, was 15. He married Margaret Howard after February 1390, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 19 February 1396, in his hometown, at the age of 24, and was buried in Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron est né en 1372, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Clifton, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cromwell, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Howard après février 1390, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 février 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterré à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron 1372 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Clifton 14 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cromwell 15. Er hat nach Februar 1390 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England Margaret Howard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Februar 1396 im Alter von 24 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Buckenham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron è nato il nel 1372 nel Buckenham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Clifton, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cromwell, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Howard dopo il febbraio 1390, nel Buckenham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 febbraio 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolto a Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baronが1372年にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで生まれた時，父Sir John Cliftonは14歳，母Elizabeth Cromwellは15歳であった。1390年2月以後にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムでMargaret Howardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年2月19日に故郷で24歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron(이)가 1372년 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Clifton(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cromwell(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1390년 2월 이후 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 Margaret Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 2월 19일 그의 고향에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 벅함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron nasceu em 1372, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Clifton, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cromwell, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Howard após fevereiro de 1390, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 24 anos, e foi sepultado em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron родился в 1372 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Clifton было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cromwell, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Howard после февраль 1390 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 февраля 1396 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 24 лет и был похоронен в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Howard después de febrero de 1390, en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
